element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Weapons reset to lowest level between levels; power state not preserved in final build
Easter egg mechanic: pressing Up+A+B on Controller 2 turns moon red before it rises

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Six-stage linear progression with escalating difficulty across stages

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Easter egg hidden mechanic in Level 2 (moon color change via controller input)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of core mechanics (movement, weapons, enemies) in Level 1
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Environmental hazards introduced by Level 2; progressive enemy complexity through Levels 3-4
difficulty_curve.late_game: Escalating challenge through Levels 5-6; final boss encounter expected
notable_spikes: Level 2 full moon event marks shift to hazard-based gameplay

notable_level_patterns.description: Six sequential levels with passive Easter eggs (Level 2 moon color change) discoverable through controller input combinations
Four-state weapon power system (0-3) that resets between levels; originally designed to be password-saveable but final build resets on continue

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Toxic Crusaders NES page)
